methodology.description: Linear regression of post-monsoon EXCESS stock returns (stock return minus Nifty 50 return) against JJAS monsoon rainfall. Excess returns isolate the monsoon-specific effect by stripping out the broader market movement.

return_periods.6m: September 30 to March 31 of next year
return_periods.1y: September 30 to September 30 of next year

methodology.model: Simple OLS linear regression: excess_return = intercept + slope × rainfall_mm
methodology.projection_caps: 6M capped at ±50%, 1Y capped at ±80% to limit outlier influence
methodology.disclaimer: This is an estimation based on historical trends, not a projection or investment advice. Correlation does not imply causation. Many factors beyond rainfall affect stock prices.

IONEXCHANG.NS.name: Ion Exchange India
IONEXCHANG.NS.sample_flag_6m: Very small sample (3 yrs) — treat with caution
IONEXCHANG.NS.sample_flag_1y: Very small sample (3 yrs) — treat with caution
